General.Name: Oeneo SA
General.Description: Oeneo SA operates in the wine industry worldwide. The company manufactures and sale of cork closures. It also provides products and solutions in wine making and spirits. Oeneo SA was founded in 1838 and is headquartered in Bordeaux, France. Oeneo SA operates as a subsidiary of Caspar SAS.
